scripts.build: prisma migrate deploy && prisma generate && next build
scripts.local:setup: npm run local:schema && prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.local.prisma && prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema.local.prisma --skip-generate && tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.local:dev: npm run local:schema && prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.local.prisma && next dev
scripts.local:build: npm run local:schema && prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.local.prisma && next build
